torch_pattern:
out1 = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, (x.shape[-1],), weight1, bias1, eps=epsilon)
out2 = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, (x.shape[-1],), weight2, bias2, eps=epsilon)

config_template.weight: None (shared normalization computed once; per-branch gamma/beta applied as separate mul/add)

weight_transform: branch weights/biases kept as separate 1D gamma/beta tensors applied after the single shared normalization (replaces N full layer_norm invocations on the same input, e.g. falcon40b ln_attn + ln_mlp)

placement_observations.source: falcon40b decoder: two sibling ttnn.layer_norm calls on replicated_hidden_states (ln_attn, ln_mlp); optimized variant computes one block-sharded layer_norm with weight=None, bias=None and applies gamma/beta per branch
